hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*|*/migrations/*|**/migrations/**|*package-lock.json|*yarn.lock|*pnpm-lock.yaml) echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Protected file: $FILE. This file should not be modified directly by the assistant.\"}}" ; exit 0 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac'

bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "Co-Authored-By"; then NEWCMD=$(echo "$CMD" | sed "s/Co-Authored-By:.*//g" | sed "/^$/d"); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"IMPORTANT: Do NOT include Co-Authored-By lines in commit messages. The plugin handles attribution automatically.\"}}"; fi; fi; exit 0'
